11.name: Dark Crystal
11.desc: A mysterious crystal pulsating with dark energy. It is linked to the eighth element and essential for accessing the final confrontation beneath the surface of the moon.

12.name: Adamantite
12.desc: A rare, super-hard metal ore sought by craftsmen and warriors alike. Used to forge some of the strongest weapons and armor in the realm.

13.name: Airship Parts
13.desc: A collection of mechanical components needed to repair or assemble an airship. Once restored, it grants the party free travel across the world’s skies.
